titleStmt.title: SII 36.98: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 98. (A.R. No. 98 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Registers a royal order of the king granting two pieces of land with a total extent of 14 (1/4) vēlis from two villages in Pāmbūr-nāḍu and Ambarnāḍu as dēvadāṉa-iṟaiyili for the conduct of festival in the month of Āvaṇi in the Mākāḷamuḍaiyār temple at Ambar, in Ambar-nāḍu, of Uyyakkoṇḍārvaḷanāḍu. The old assessment on land was revised to one hundered kalams of paddy per vēli. The revised total tax was reduced from the old rates of assessment at the ratio of 10: 6 and the total demand was fixed at 859 kalams of paddy. The royal order was signed by officers of the revenue department, Puravuvari Śrīkaraṇa Nāyagam, Puravuvari Śrīkaraṇa mugaveṭṭi and was issued to the managers (dēvakaṉmikaḷ) of the temple, māhēshvarak kaṇkāṇi, and śrīkāriyam. Refers to the revenue survey of the 16th year of Sungandavirta Kulōttuṅga Chōḻadēva (Kulōttuṅga I).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampar tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār koyiliṟ patipātamū
lappaṭṭuṭai pañcācāriyat tevakaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum Ittevarkku Āvaṇi māsattu ti
runāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Iṟuppatāka Irupatteḻāvatu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭa nām nīrvārtta nilam patiṟṟu velikku tevarkku Iṟukka
veli Oṉṟukku nūṟṟirupatiṉ kalamāka vanta nellukkum Antarāyam pāṭṭattukku Iṟukkumpaṭi kācukku veṇṭuvatukkum Iṭaveṇṭum nilattukkup pāmpūr nā
ṭṭu kaṭaiyakkuṭiyāṉa vallavallac catuppetimaṅkalattu Ampar nāṭṭu cempaṅkuṭi Oṭumkūṭa Oṭṭi Iṟukkiṟa nilam nīkki niṉṟa nilattile patiṉmūṉṟarai
ye mākāṇi nilamum kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ pācāliyil kācu pāti mutal koṇṭa nilattu Iṭukiṟa nilam mukkāle Oru māvaraik kāṇikkuc cuṅkan tavirtta ku
lottuṅkacoḻatevarkku patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷantapaṭi nīṅkal nīkki mukkāle Arai mā nilamum muṉiṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭi tavirttu Irupatteṭṭāvatu mutal tevatāṉa I
ṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭum Innilattukkuk kāṇikkaṭaṉ veli Oṉṟukku nellu nūṟṟukkalattiṉāl pattāṟākki Aṟupatiṉ kalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiyum variyilārum varikkukūṟu ceyvārka
ḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari taraccoṉṉom Inilam Irupatteṭṭāvatu mutal Ittevarkku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoḷka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraōlai mīṉavaṉ mū
ventaveḷāṉ Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vilāṭarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai paṅkaḷattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḻiṉaittarai
yaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ciṅkaḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pāñcālarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ... § Irupattu Eṭṭāvatu nāḷ ṉūṟṟañcuṉāl prasādantaruḷiya tirumukappaṭi . §
yāṇṭu Irupattu Eṭṭāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟiṉāl tevatāna Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampart tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār Āvaṇi māsattu tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Iṟuppatāka Irupattu Ēḻāvatu nīrvārttaruḷiṉa nilam patiṟṟu velikku tevarkku Iṟukka veli Onṟukku
nūṟṟu Irupatin kalamāka vanta nellukkum Antarāyappāṭṭattukku Iṟukkumpaṭi kācukku veṇṭuvatukkum Ivveṇṭum nilamāy muniṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭi tavuntu yāṇṭu Irupattu Eṭṭāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa pāmpūr nāṭṭu kaṭaiyakkuṭiyāna vallavallavac caruppetimaṅkalam Ampar nāṭṭu cempaṅkuṭi Ōrūṟum kūṭaoṭṭi I
ṟukkiṟa nilam nīkki niṉṟa nilattu nilam patinmūnṟaraiye mākāṇiyile nilam Ōrpāti paḻaviṟai nellu Eḻunūṟṟu muppattu nāṟkalane tūṇippatakku Orunāḻi mūvuḻakku niccayitta Ōrpāti nellu Aiññūṟṟu Irupatin kalane Irutūṇip patakku nānāḻi Uḻakku Ippaṭi tavira yāṇṭu Irupattu Eṭṭāvatu mutal veli Onṟukku nellu nūṟṟu kala
māka Iṟaikaṭṭina kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu Āyirattu munnūṟṟu Aimpattu Aṟu kalane mukkuṟuṇi pattu Āṟākki nellu Eṇṇūṟṟu Orupattu mukkalene Irutūṇik kuṟuṇi kulottuṅkacoḻan pācāliyil kācu pāti mutal koṇṭa nilattu nilam mukkāle Orumā Araikkāṇināl nilamōrpāti paḻaviṟai nellu nāṟpattu
aṟu kalane Aṟunāḻi niccayitta Ōrpāti nellu muppattu Eṇkalane kuṟuṇi mūvuḻakku Āḻākku Uṭaiyār cuṅkantavuttaruḷina kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku patināṟāvatu Aḷantapaṭi nīṅkal nīkki nilam mukkāle Arai mā muppattu Ēḻāvatu niccayitta Ōr pāti nellu nāṟpattu nāṟkalane Irutūṇi
nā nāḻi Uḻakku Ippaṭi tavira yāṇṭu Irupattueṭṭāvatu mutal veli Onṟukku nellu nūṟṟu kalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭina kāṇikkaṭan nellu Eḻupattu Eḻu kalane tūṇippatakkunāl pattāṟākki nellu nāṟpattuaṟu kalane tūṇippatakkum Irupattu Eṭṭāvatu mutal tevatāna Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku
Ivai purovari cīkaraṇanāyakam Uḻantai Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai purovari cīkaraṇanāyakam Īṅkai Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai purovari cīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi Ārūr Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai purovari cīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi pantaṇanallūrruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai purovari cīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi ciṟu veḷūār Uṭai
yān Eḻuttu Ivai purovari cīkaraṇa nāyakam nelku(ā)nṟaṅkiḻaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai purovari cīkaraṇa nāyakam pantaṇanallūrruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai purovari cīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi paṉaiyūr Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai vannāṭuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷavataraiyan Eḻuttu Ivai Ataḷaiyūr nāṭāḻvān Eḻuttu
Ivai canakarāyan Eḻuttu Ivai vicaiyarāyan Eḻuttu Ivai cempiyattaraiyan Eḻuttu Ivai veṇāṭṭaraiyan Eḻuttu Ivai menāṭṭaraiyan Eḻuttu Ivai kāṭavarāyan Eḻuttu Ivai Amarakon Eḻuttu Ivai vecālipparaiyan Eḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāyan Eḻuttu Ivai vāṇātarāyan Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
